channel.title: Hands-On Windows (Video)
channel.itunes:author: TWiT
channel.copyright: This work is licensed under a Creative Commons License - Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivatives 4.0 International - http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/4.0/
channel.itunes:subtitle: Handy tips, helpful advice, and everything new in Windows 11.
channel.itunes:summary:
Hands-On Windows, featuring Paul Thurrott, will help you adapt to the changes made in Windows 11. From visual tweaks to performance boosts Hands-On Windows will show you how to get the most out of your Windows 11 PC. You can join Club TWiT for $10 per month and get ad-free audio and video feeds for all our shows plus everything else the club offers...or get just this podcast ad-free for $5 per month.
New episodes every Thursday.
channel.description:
Hands-On Windows, featuring Paul Thurrott, will help you adapt to the changes made in Windows 11. From visual tweaks to performance boosts Hands-On Windows will show you how to get the most out of your Windows 11 PC. You can join Club TWiT for $10 per month and get ad-free audio and video feeds for all our shows plus everything else the club offers...or get just this podcast ad-free for $5 per month.
New episodes every Thursday.
channel.itunes:keywords: Microsoft Windows, Windows 11, windows11, w11, Windows tips, Windows tricks, Windows shortcuts, Paul Thurrott, Windows how-to, Windows macros

item.title: HOW 180: The Return of Microsoft Edit - Notepad, Move Over
item.itunes:title: The Return of Microsoft Edit - Notepad, Move Over
item.itunes:author: TWiT
item.itunes:subtitle: Notepad, Move Over
item.itunes:keywords: microsoft edit, Windows 11 text editor, Notepad controversy, markdown support, Copilot integration, command line interface, CLI app, Linux compatibility, Microsoft software, open source, GitHub download, keyboard shortcuts, word wrap, find and replace
item.description:
Microsoft Edit is stepping into the spotlight as Notepad faces backlash for its new AI-heavy features. Find out why this lightweight, command-line text editor might just be your next favorite productivity tool.

Host: Paul Thurrott

Download or subscribe to Hands-On Windows at https://twit.tv/shows/hands-on-windows

Join Club TWiT for Ad-Free Podcasts!
Support what you love and get ad-free audio and video feeds, a members-only Discord, and exclusive content. Join today: https://twit.tv/clubtwit

Club TWiT members can discuss this episode and leave feedback in the Club TWiT Discord.

Sponsor:

  • threatlocker.com/twit

media:content.media:keywords: microsoft edit, Windows 11 text editor, Notepad controversy, markdown support, Copilot integration, command line interface, CLI app, Linux compatibility, Microsoft software, open source, GitHub download, keyboard shortcuts, word wrap, find and replace

item.title: HOW 179: Surviving OneDrive Sync - The Hidden Drama of Windows Folder Sync
item.itunes:title: Surviving OneDrive Sync - The Hidden Drama of Windows Folder Sync
item.itunes:author: TWiT
item.itunes:subtitle: The Hidden Drama of Windows Folder Sync
item.itunes:keywords: OneDrive Folder Backup, windows 11, onedrive sync, manage backup, local folders vs cloud, OneDrive Personal, file explorer, Desktop/Documents/Pictures folders, Windows 11 Home and Pro, file commingling, SSD storage, Microsoft file syncing
item.description:
OneDrive's automatic folder backup in Windows 11 has frustrated millions, but this episode reveals new changes that finally let users opt out—if you act fast. Find out how Microsoft's latest update could solve, or complicate, your cloud storage headaches.

Host: Paul Thurrott

Download or subscribe to Hands-On Windows at https://twit.tv/shows/hands-on-windows

Join Club TWiT for Ad-Free Podcasts!
Support what you love and get ad-free audio and video feeds, a members-only Discord, and exclusive content. Join today: https://twit.tv/clubtwit

Club TWiT members can discuss this episode and leave feedback in the Club TWiT Discord.
item.itunes:summary:

item.content:encoded:
OneDrive's automatic folder backup in Windows 11 has frustrated millions, but this episode reveals new changes that finally let users opt out—if you act fast. Find out how Microsoft's latest update could solve, or complicate, your cloud storage headaches.

Host: Paul Thurrott

media:content.media:keywords: OneDrive Folder Backup, windows 11, onedrive sync, manage backup, local folders vs cloud, OneDrive Personal, file explorer, Desktop/Documents/Pictures folders, Windows 11 Home and Pro, file commingling, SSD storage, Microsoft file syncing

item.title: HOW 178: Microsoft's Password Manager - Why Edge Isn't Enough for True Security
item.itunes:title: Microsoft's Password Manager - Why Edge Isn't Enough for True Security
item.itunes:author: TWiT
item.itunes:subtitle: Why Edge Isn't Enough for True Security
item.itunes:keywords: Microsoft Password Manager, Windows 11 password management, Edge browser passwords, third-party password managers, password autofill, passkey management, password security, BitWarden, proton pass, password generator, weak passwords, password change link,
item.description:
Think Microsoft's password manager in Windows 11 is enough? Paul Thurrott breaks down why even devoted Edge users might want to look elsewhere for true password security.

Host: Paul Thurrott

Download or subscribe to Hands-On Windows at https://twit.tv/shows/hands-on-windows

Join Club TWiT for Ad-Free Podcasts!
Support what you love and get ad-free audio and video feeds, a members-only Discord, and exclusive content. Join today: https://twit.tv/clubtwit

  • canary.tools/twit - use code: TWIT

item.title: HOW 177: Password Managers and Windows 11 - The Key to Your Online Security
item.itunes:title: Password Managers and Windows 11 - The Key to Your Online Security
item.itunes:author: TWiT
item.itunes:subtitle: The Key to Your Online Security
item.itunes:keywords: password managers, windows 11, BitWarden, protonpass, 1password, dashlane, google password manager, Microsoft Password Manager, edge, chrome, online account security, passkeys, two-factor authentication, autofill, biometric security, importing passwords,
item.description:
From generating passkeys and payment autofill to dark web monitoring, today's password managers aren't what you remember. Paul Thurrott breaks down the must-have features and surprising pitfalls for anyone using Windows 11.

Host: Paul Thurrott

Download or subscribe to Hands-On Windows at https://twit.tv/shows/hands-on-windows

Join Club TWiT for Ad-Free Podcasts!
Support what you love and get ad-free audio and video feeds, a members-only Discord, and exclusive content. Join today: https://twit.tv/clubtwit

  • bitwarden.com/twit

item.title: HOW 176: A Practical Guide to Secure, Passwordless Logins - A Smarter Passkey Setup
item.itunes:title: A Practical Guide to Secure, Passwordless Logins - A Smarter Passkey Setup
item.itunes:author: TWiT
item.itunes:subtitle: A Smarter Passkey Setup
item.itunes:keywords: passkeys, windows 11, Microsoft Password Manager, third-party password manager, protonpass, 1password, BitWarden, dashlane, passkey integration, password autofill, web browser extension, edge, chrome, Brave, authentication, Windows Hello, Device Security,
item.description:
Forget the built-in Windows tools—Paul shares why third-party password managers are the secret to making passkeys smarter, more powerful, and truly universal across all your devices.

Host: Paul Thurrott

Download or subscribe to Hands-On Windows at https://twit.tv/shows/hands-on-windows

item.title: HOW 175: Passkeys in 25h2 - Moving Beyond Passwords
item.itunes:title: Passkeys in 25h2 - Moving Beyond Passwords
item.itunes:author: TWiT
item.itunes:subtitle: Moving Beyond Passwords
item.itunes:keywords: passkeys, Windows 11 25H2, multi factor authentication, two factor authentication, phishing resistance, device bound passkey, portable passkey, Microsoft Password Manager, Microsoft edge, third party password manager, 1password, BitWarden, Windows Hello,
item.description:
Curious about the reality behind Microsoft's passkey promise? Find out how Windows 11's latest update makes your logins both safer and simpler across all your devices, and why Paul Thurrott thinks you shouldn't rely on the default options.

Host: Paul Thurrott

item.title: HOW 174: 2026 Security Checkup - Master Your Microsoft Account Security
item.itunes:title: 2026 Security Checkup - Master Your Microsoft Account Security
item.itunes:author: TWiT
item.itunes:subtitle: Master Your Microsoft Account Security
item.itunes:keywords: Windows 11 security checkup, Microsoft account security, two-factor authentication, multi-factor authentication, authenticator apps, Microsoft Authenticator, google authenticator, proton authenticator, passkeys, passwordless sign-in, password manager
item.description:
Ready to purge old passwords and shore up your Microsoft account? Paul Thurrott breaks down the tactics hackers hope you'll ignore—and the must-have steps to keep your digital life safe this year.

Host: Paul Thurrott

Download or subscribe to Hands-On Windows at https://twit.tv/shows/hands-on-windows

item.title: HOW 173: Keyboard Shortcuts in 2026 - Hotkeys Power Users Swear By Every Day
item.itunes:title: Keyboard Shortcuts in 2026 - Hotkeys Power Users Swear By Every Day
item.itunes:author: TWiT
item.itunes:subtitle: Hotkeys Power Users Swear By Every Day
item.itunes:keywords: microsoft windows, windows 11, windows11, w11, Windows tips, Windows tricks, Windows shortcuts, Paul Thurrott, Windows how-to, Windows macros
item.description:
Think you know Windows shortcuts? Paul digs up the most efficient keys almost nobody uses, uncovering tricks Microsoft added—and quietly changed—since your last settings update.

Host: Paul Thurrott

item.title: HOW 172: Native Apps to Keep or Delete - Which Windows 11 Apps Deserve a Spot on Your PC
item.itunes:title: Native Apps to Keep or Delete - Which Windows 11 Apps Deserve a Spot on Your PC
item.itunes:author: TWiT
item.itunes:subtitle: Which Windows 11 Apps Deserve a Spot on Your PC
item.itunes:keywords: Windows 11 built-in apps, best Windows 11 apps, Windows 11 bloatware, removing Windows apps, essential Windows utilities, windows 11 notepad, Clipchamp video editor, microsoft store, winget package manager, Microsoft Edge alternatives, Xbox app Windows
item.description:
Is Windows 11 full of apps you never use—or ones you shouldn't ignore? Paul Thurrott sorts the must-haves from the major annoyances, sharing candid takes on which programs he trusts, deletes, or wishes would finally disappear.

Host: Paul Thurrott

Download or subscribe to Hands-On Windows at https://twit.tv/shows/hands-on-windows

item.title: HOW 171: 5 New Features Coming in 2026 - What's New in Windows 11 for Power Users This Year
item.itunes:title: 5 New Features Coming in 2026 - What's New in Windows 11 for Power Users This Year
item.itunes:author: TWiT
item.itunes:subtitle: What's New in Windows 11 for Power Users This Year
item.itunes:keywords: windows 11 features, Drag Tray, Share dialog, dark mode File Explorer, Copilot Plus PC, app actions, widgets, Discover feed, advanced settings, Dev Drive, resilient file system, End Task, Windows Terminal, Sudo, developer mode, mobile device settings
item.description:
Windows is gearing up for a transformational year, with smarter Copilot actions, streamlined widgets, and the groundwork for running background AI agents. Discover what these changes could mean for your productivity and privacy.

Host: Paul Thurrott

Download or subscribe to Hands-On Windows at https://twit.tv/shows/hands-on-windows

media:content.media:description: What's New in Windows 11 for Power Users This Year
media:content.media:keywords: windows 11 features, Drag Tray, Share dialog, dark mode File Explorer, Copilot Plus PC, app actions, widgets, Discover feed, advanced settings, Dev Drive, resilient file system, End Task, Windows Terminal, Sudo, developer mode, mobile device settings
